title: Is there any way to connect Monday with Google data studio?
excerpt:
Hi, is there an existing solution to send data from some boards in Monday to google data studio for more in-depth report analysis? 
I saw there’s pivot widget in Monday, but I am not looking into changing to Enterprise.

posts.author: Norawat (Norawat Vera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, is there an existing solution to send data from some boards in Monday to google data studio for more in-depth report analysis?

I saw there’s pivot widget in Monday, but I am not looking into changing to Enterprise.

posts.author: mactoph (Christopher Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know this is an old post, but I was looking into the same issue and found a few tools that may be helpful for anyone else looking for this functionality:

  1. Looker Studio Connector
  2. Monday Data Studio connector
  3. Monday.com Connector?

We are looking into building our own and will try to share any code if we are able to get it to work.

posts.author: stuttters (Jon Stuttfield)
posts.cookedHtml: @mactoph Did you settle on one of these tools in the end? Any recommendations?

posts.author: mactoph (Christopher Phillips)
posts.cookedHtml: @stuttters We ended up building our own integration - I will talk to our developer and see if we are able to share the code and report back here.

posts.author: LordPug (Marcus)
posts.cookedHtml: @mactoph will you be able to share your custom integration, did you check with the your developer?

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Norawat

Our dedicated monday.com consultants can help you set up a custom Studio Report solution that facilitates easy integration and transferal of board information into Google Data Studio reports.

By utilizing our custom solution, you can enhance your monday.com board view or dashboard with reports, metrics, and analytics straight from Google Data Studio.

Book a meeting with us here to get started, and if you have any queries at all please feel free to connect with me here!

posts.author: Norawat (Norawat Vera)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the reply.
Right now I don’t need to use this solution anymore.

posts.author: AsesorNica (Danilo)
posts.cookedHtml: Hola Neelam, necesito ayuda con este tema. Tengo tableros en Monday que deseo conectar con Looker Studio para mi dashboard. Puedes darme una idea o ayuda, por favor? Saludos Danilo
